title: 皐月賞の後に・勝ちたかった

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite their valiant standoff, neither Sakura
Chiyono O nor Yaeno Muteki manage to win the
race. Both of them let out impassioned cries of
frustration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They realize how painful it is to fail, and just how
desperately they wanted to win against their rival
in a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them sincerely wanted to defeat each
other. They both wanted to come in first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Mejiro Ardan watches from the stands, she
burns with eagerness, ready to give it her all in
one of the few races she'll ever get to run—the
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the Japanese Derby—the most
important race of all in Sakura Chiyono O's eyes.
